title: clapbxt smp
description:
SMP PvP pack for 1.21.11

includes tweaks like small items, no particles, and better textures!
body:
Includes:

Quiet Rain
Small totem, shield
low fire
armor dura overlay
armor, totem, swords, axe, cobweb, pearls, xp, and gapple textures
visible water
no totem particles
no block break particles
custom font
dark transparent gui
satisfying sounds
